message:
fix: filter pseudo-versions and dirty builds from version detection

Local `go build` and `go run` produce pseudo-versions (e.g.,
v0.14.5-0.20260212...-abcdef123456) or dirty-suffixed versions from
debug.ReadBuildInfo(). These are ugly and cause false update
notifications. Filter them out so local builds fall through to the
clean hardcoded fallback version.

Fixes Dicklesworthstone/beads_viewer#103

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
